# SaaS Plane Migration Scope

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to integration gates](../integration-gates.md)

`saasplane` adapts SaaS assignment HTTP APIs into the provider-neutral TaskSourcePort and TaskReporterPort.

- It uses the shared `riido-contracts/assignment` surface.
- It translates polling, heartbeat, assignment events, tool approval, and runtime snapshot calls.
- Control-plane HTTP handlers, stores, authZ, metrics, persistence, Terraform, and deploy evidence remain outside this public daemon repo.
